meta.purpose: Synthetic demo-safe marketplace seeding for MAABAR UX evaluation
meta.warning: All companies, names, descriptions, IDs, and media are synthetic demo data. No real private documents or official records are included.
meta.coverageNote: The current app exposes 6 first-class category enums, so 10 commercial sectors are represented through speciality/profile/product narratives with category mapping where needed.
meta.chosenApproach: Prepare synthetic account manifest + SQL upserts/inserts keyed by profile email, so demo accounts can be created through existing auth flow and enriched through existing Supabase tables.
